spread.note: Indian markets are highly liquid for top 50 stocks. Spreads are tight during market hours.

slippage.note: Market order fill deviation. NSE is very liquid for large caps.

fx_conversion.note: No FX conversion needed — trading in INR on NSE.

statutory_charges.note: STT (Securities Transaction Tax) is the largest statutory cost. GST is on brokerage + exchange charges.

dp_charges.note: ₹15.93 per scrip per day when selling delivery holdings. Charged by CDSL via Zerodha.

overnight_fee.note: No overnight fee for delivery positions in India.

cfd.note: India does not have CFD trading. Short selling is intraday only (BTST via SLB is separate).

inactivity_fee.note: No inactivity fee on Zerodha. Annual AMC of ₹300 for demat account.

tax.stcg_note: Short-term capital gains (held < 1 year) taxed at 20% (Budget 2024)
tax.ltcg_note: Long-term capital gains (held > 1 year) taxed at 12.5% above ₹1.25 lakh exemption (Budget 2024)
tax.note: Capital gains tax rates as per Union Budget 2024. STT paid qualifies the transaction for special CG rates.
